summary: Completed comprehensive testing of School/Organization Management feature. All backend APIs (22 tests) passed. Frontend UI testing verified all components work correctly: School SignUp form, School Dashboard with calendar/members/seasons, and Season Management with roster/opponents/game scheduling.

issues: Route is /school/signup not /school-signup - may need redirect for consistency

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed MongoDB _id serialization issue in create_season, create_school_team, and create_school_game endpoints - was causing 520 errors
seed_data_creation: Used existing test session from iteration_17. Created test seasons, teams, opponents, and games during API testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: School feature is fully functional. Backend APIs all working. Frontend pages verified: /school/signup, /school-dashboard, /school/season/:seasonId. Test data created includes multiple seasons, teams with rosters, opponents, and scheduled games.

tests: Page loads with all form fields
School name availability check - shows X for taken names
School name availability check - shows checkmark for available names
Header shows school name (Moose Academy) and state (Texas)
Admin badge visible for admin users
Team Members section with member count
Members table with Name, Email, Role, Actions columns
Invite button opens dialog with invite link
Create season dialog has sport select and name input
Page loads with season name and school name
Add Game button (enabled when team configured)
Team Roster tab shows player list
Edit Roster button opens roster dialog
Roster dialog has Manual Entry, CSV Upload, From Website tabs
Current roster display with delete buttons
Opponent dialog has team name and color picker

endpoints_tested: GET /api/schools/invite/{code} - Get school by invite code

bugs_fixed.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error causing 520 errors on POST endpoints
bugs_fixed.fix: Added .pop('_id', None) before returning response in create_season, create_school_team, and create_school_game functions
